message.content: Synthesis is running cleanly. Let me now update the stage tracker and give you a proper welcome-back summary.

function.arguments: {"command": "plan", "stage_list": [{"id": "S1", "name": "Requirements + Spec + Padframe + Advisory", "status": "done", "notes": "All artifacts: requirements.md, spec.md, padframe_requirements.md, soc_config.yaml, spec_advisory.md"}, {"id": "S2", "name": "Verification Planning", "status": "done", "notes": "verification_checklist.md/html + 21 scenario YAML files + scenario_manifest.yaml"}, {"id": "S3", "name": "Generation (nc_chipgen generate)", "status": "done", "notes": "mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/ generated, all 82 RTL files present"}, {"id": "S4", "name": "Verification Execution", "status": "done", "notes": "21/21 PASS \u2014 all derivative deltas confirmed (512KB flash, 128KB SRAM, 1 ADC, 3 I2C, I2C2@0x4000B000/IRQ11)"}, {"id": "S5", "name": "Verification Review + Dashboard + Advisory", "status": "done", "notes": "97/97 PASS, PROCEED_TO_PNR verdict, verification_dashboard.html + verification_review_advisory.md"}, {"id": "S6", "name": "Physical Design (PnR)", "status": "in_progress", "notes": "pnr_run_v2 in progress: PID 20756, step 03/Yosys.Synthesis running. All config fixes applied: IP paths, RUN_CTS=false, amuxbus removed, FP_TEMPLATE_COPY_POWER_PINS=false, DRT_OPT_ITERS=40, 82 VERILOG_FILES, 0 broken paths"}]}
function.name: stage_tracker

stage_list.name: Requirements + Spec + Padframe + Advisory
stage_list.notes: All artifacts: requirements.md, spec.md, padframe_requirements.md, soc_config.yaml, spec_advisory.md

stage_list.name: Generation (nc_chipgen generate)
stage_list.notes: mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/ generated, all 82 RTL files present

stage_list.name: Verification Execution
stage_list.notes: 21/21 PASS — all derivative deltas confirmed (512KB flash, 128KB SRAM, 1 ADC, 3 I2C, I2C2@0x4000B000/IRQ11)

stage_list.name: Physical Design (PnR)
stage_list.notes: pnr_run_v2 in progress: PID 20756, step 03/Yosys.Synthesis running. All config fixes applied: IP paths, RUN_CTS=false, amuxbus removed, FP_TEMPLATE_COPY_POWER_PINS=false, DRT_OPT_ITERS=40, 82 VERILOG_FILES, 0 broken paths
